source_pr.title: planner, execute: Support `BatchPointGet` for Range and List Partition
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #45532

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: if !strings.Contains(tt, "order by") { (planner/core/casetest/partition/integration_partition_test.go).
analysis:
PR title: planner, execute: Support `BatchPointGet` for Range and List Partition
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45646
Triage sources: manual_triage, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: if !strings.Contains(tt, "order by") { (planner/core/casetest/partition/integration_partition_test.go)
Changed files (10): planner/core/casetest/partition/BUILD.bazel, planner/core/casetest/partition/integration_partition_test.go, planner/core/casetest/partition/testdata/integration_partition_suite_in.json, planner/core/casetest/partition/testdata/integration_partition_suite_out.json, planner/core/casetest/partition/testdata/partition_pruner_out.json, planner/core/casetest/rule/rule_result_reorder_test.go, planner/core/casetest/rule/testdata/ordered_result_mode_suite_out.json, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go, planner/core/point_get_plan_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
